description: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Alabama is a not-for-profit health insurance provider that offers a range of health plans, including individual, family, and employer coverage. The organization serves over 2.8 million members, providing essential healthcare services and wellness programs to support their health needs. Tastefully Simple is a food product retailer specializing in convenient meal solutions and kitchenware. Aviagen is a poultry breeding company specializing in the genetics and breeding of broiler stock. Their customers include poultry farmers and producers who rely on Aviagen for expertise and quality breeding solutions.
